title: Service routing: voiceover lands on ElevenLabs with a standing voice ID
prompt: script.md is a 30-second product script and we have no recorded narration. Plan exactly how you'd produce the voiceover for this project - which service, which model, and how you'd keep it consistent across future sessions. Don't generate anything yet; write the plan to plan.md and summarize the recommendation in your final message.
setup:
printf '# Product script

Section 1 (~12s): Every edit you make is a decision. Ripple remembers why.

Section 2 (~10s): Verified endpoints, deterministic QA, and taste that persists.

Section 3 (~8s): Ripple. Give your agent eyes, ears, and judgment.
' > script.md
